title: Klaviyo vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which is best for your business needs.
intro: Klaviyo and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Klaviyo excels at e-commerce automation and data-driven segmentation, while Flodesk prioritizes beautiful design and simplicity. Your choice depends on whether you need advanced automation for online sales or elegant templates for visual storytelling.

comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited subscribers at any price tier
Beautiful design, visual templates, ease of use

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced automation
You want predictive analytics and sophisticated segmentation to drive sales
You have a large subscriber list and want to start free or keep costs low initially
SMS marketing capabilities are important for your strategy
choose_b_if: Design quality and template aesthetics are your top priority
You want unlimited subscribers without worrying about contact tier pricing
You prefer simple, flat-rate pricing with no surprises
You're a creative professional (designer, photographer, artist) targeting visual audiences
You want to leverage an affiliate program to earn 50% recurring commission

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is better for e-commerce automation, predictive analytics, and SMS marketing. Flodesk is better for visual design, simplicity, and unlimited subscriber scaling. Klaviyo has higher G2 (4.6) and Trustpilot (3.8) ratings overall, but Flodesk scores slightly higher on Trustpilot (4.7) for customer satisfaction.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Flodesk?
faq.a: Flodesk has a lower entry price at $38/month with unlimited subscribers. Klaviyo starts at $0 with a free tier (500 subscribers) but paid plans begin at $45/month with subscriber-based pricing. For small lists, Klaviyo's free tier wins; for large lists, Flodesk's unlimited model is more cost-effective.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and email history. The migration process typically involves exporting contacts as CSV from Flodesk and importing them into Klaviyo. You'll need to recreate your automations and flows manually, as these don't transfer automatically between platforms.
